name: Mecha Phantom Beast Tetherwolf
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>幻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>機</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>テザーウルフ
desc: If this card is Normal Summoned: Special Summon 1 "Mecha Phantom Beast Token" (Machine/WIND/Level 3/ATK 0/DEF 0). This card's Level is increased by the total Levels of all "Mecha Phantom Beast Tokens" you control. While you control a Token, this card cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects. Once per battle, during the Damage Step, when this card battles an opponent's monster (Quick Effect): You can Tribute 1 Token; this card gains 800 ATK, until the end of this turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal Summoned: Special Summon 1 "Mecha Phantom Beast Token" (Machine/WIND/Level 3/ATK 0/DEF 0). This card's Level is increased by the total Levels of all "Mecha Phantom Beast Tokens" you control. While you control a Token, this card cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects. Once per battle, during the Damage Step, when this card battles an opponent's monster (Quick Effect): You can Tribute 1 Token; this card gains 800 ATK, until the end of this turn.
